---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[
# Designing Solutions for Environmental Problems
]

.size35[
- BIOL 163: Science of the Environment

- ECON 225: Introduction to Environmental Economics

- PHIL 320: Environmental Ethics

- PLSC 323: Issues in Environmental Policy
]




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-PFAS_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: bottom, left

# Sam Black 

# (Chemistry)

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

# PFAS "Forever Chemicals"



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-growing_food_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: top, right, inverse, textwhite

# Corbin Tarr 

# (Philosophy and Religion)

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

# Local Food Accessibility Issues



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-SGF_Traffic_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: bottom, left, inverse, textwhite

# Rachel Hon 

# (Political Science and English)

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

# Air Quality in Springfield




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-smog.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: top, left, inverse, textwhite

# Griffin Hirst 

# (Political Science)

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

# Ground-level Ozone (Smog)




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[
# Designing Solutions for Environmental Problems
]

.size35[
- BIOL 163: Science of the Environment

- ECON 225: Introduction to Environmental Economics

- PHIL 320: Environmental Ethics

- PLSC 323: Issues in Environmental Policy
]

.center[
# Questions?
]
